release_blocking_targets.justification: all, test, check, and make-quality delegate to quality, making the full C gate the default release and verification path.

compiler_warning_coverage.justification: The gate includes a strict GCC build, strict Clang syntax checking, and Clang sanitizer builds with -std=c17 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Werror.

static_analysis_and_formatting.justification: format-check, clang-tidy-check, and cppcheck-check are included in quality and fail the target if any required tool reports an issue.

runtime_defect_coverage.justification: asan-test and ubsan-test are hard-failing sanitizer targets, and valgrind-test now forces a clean strict GCC rebuild before running under Valgrind.

test_coverage.justification: test-suite runs the shell fixture path and python3 -m pytest tests/ -q, keeping fixture-backed CLI coverage and Python regression tests inside the release-blocking gate.
